---
title: "The Rev. John Richard Bogue"
---

## The Rev. John Richard Bogue

**Dates:** (1808-1857)

### Description

Vicar of Denbury, cousin of CMY

### Biography

CMY\'s grandfather the Rev. Thomas Bargus had an elder sister, Mary, who married Dr. Bogue, of Farnham.  John Richard Bogue was evidently her grandson. He married (1840) Sophia Elizabeth Mudge. [S. R. Flint, <i>Mudge Memoirs</i> (1883), IGI]

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 5th [1863]
- Letter from Friday [17 March 1854]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
